items.symbol: emView::ViewFlags (typedef + enum constants: VF_POPUP_ZOOM, VF_ROOT_SAME_TALLNESS, VF_NO_ZOOM, VF_NO_USER_NAVIGATION, VF_NO_FOCUS_HIGHLIGHT, VF_NO_ACTIVE_HIGHLIGHT, VF_EGO_MODE, VF_STRESS_TEST)
items.notes: Rust uses bitflags! ViewFlags with equivalent constants (VF_EGO_MODE not present; VF_STRESS_TEST not present in Rust; VF_NO_SCROLL/FULLSCREEN are additions). Core flags ported.
View::new(root, viewport_width, viewport_height) is the Rust constructor.

items.superseding_construct: Rust Drop trait handles cleanup automatically
items.notes: No explicit destructor needed.
C++ cross-pointer pattern not used in Rust.
View::flags (pub field) + View::set_view_flags(ViewFlags, &mut PanelTree).
Signal system not ported; Rust uses direct state polling.
View::background_color() and View::set_background_color(Color).
Title management not ported; Rust View has title_invalid flag but no GetTitle API.
Signal system not ported.
Control panel delegation not ported.
View::window_focused() and View::set_window_focused(). Focus() action not directly ported (platform concern). Signal not ported.
Window/screen context hierarchy not ported to Rust.
View::viewport_size() returns (width, height). Pixel tallness stored in view.pixel_tallness. No Home vs Current distinction (no popup zoom implemented). Geometry signal not ported.
Popup zoom feature not ported.
VIF chain linked list not ported; Rust VIFs are standalone structs called directly.
View::root() returns PanelId.
View::supreme_panel() / View::svp().
View::active(), View::set_active_panel(), View::set_active_panel_best_possible(), View::is_activation_adherent().
View::get_panel_by_identity(&PanelTree, &str).
View::get_panel_at() / View::get_focusable_panel_at().
View::current_visit() returns &VisitState with panel, rel_x, rel_y, rel_a.

View::visit_next/prev/first/last/left/right/up/down/in/out() all present.

View::get_zoom_factor_log_per_pixel().
View::zoom_out(), View::raw_zoom_out(), View::is_zoomed_out().
Popup zoom feature not implemented in Rust.
View::signal_eoi_delayed(), View::eoi_delayed(), View::tick_eoi(). Signal itself replaced by polling.
Soft keyboard management not ported.
Input clock not exposed in Rust View.
Touch priority not on View struct in Rust.
View::needs_animator_abort flag for abort; animator state managed externally in window loop. Magnetic activation done externally.
Virtual dispatch pattern not used; Rust uses direct filter calls.
Cursor management not ported in this form.
View::paint(&mut PanelTree, &mut Painter).
View::invalidate_painting() and View::invalidate_painting_rect(). Cursor invalidation tracked via cursor_invalid field.
Cheat code mechanism not ported.

items.symbol: emViewPort class: emViewPort(emView&), ~emViewPort(), GetViewX/Y/Width/Height(), GetViewCursor(), PaintView()
items.superseding_construct: No ViewPort abstraction in Rust; SoftwareCompositor and WgpuCompositor serve this role (src/render/software_compositor.rs, src/render/compositor.rs)
items.notes: Rust renders directly without a ViewPort indirection layer.

items.symbol: emViewPort::SetViewGeometry / SetViewFocused / RequestFocus / IsSoftKeyboardShown / ShowSoftKeyboard / GetInputClockMS / InputToView / InvalidateCursor / InvalidatePainting [protected]
items.superseding_construct: View::set_viewport(), View::set_window_focused() in panel/view.rs; render pipeline in src/render/
items.notes: Protected ViewPort interface superseded by direct View methods.

items.symbol: emViewAnimator class: constructor, ~emViewAnimator(), GetView(), SetMaster/GetMaster/GetActiveSlave(), IsActive(), Activate/Deactivate(), IsDeactivatingWhenIdle/SetDeactivateWhenIdle(), Input(), Paint(), Cycle(), CycleAnimation(), InvalidatePainting()
items.notes: ViewAnimator trait with animate()/is_active()/stop(). Master/slave hierarchy and emEngine Cycle() pattern replaced by direct trait dispatch.

MouseZoomScrollVIF struct with rich mouse/wheel animation methods.

items.symbol: emViewRenderer: constructor(emRootContext&), ~emViewRenderer(), RenderView(const emViewPort&, const emClipRects<int>&), PrepareBuffers() [protected pure virtual], GetBufferPainter() [protected pure virtual], AsyncFlushBuffer() [protected pure virtual]
items.notes: The multi-thread buffer rendering abstraction is replaced by SoftwareCompositor::render() and WgpuCompositor. Thread pool management not ported; single-threaded software path and GPU path used instead.
